title: Google Maps Reviews Scraper
description: Extract customer reviews from a specific Google Maps business using the business ID and sort preference.

business_id.title: Business ID
business_id.description: Google Maps business/place ID in format 0x[hex]:0x[hex] (e.g., '0x540556df42a1ed52:0xc7ea5e2d51f2f65f')

limit.title: Limit Per Page
limit.description: Number of reviews per page (1-20, default: 10)

page.title: Page Token
page.description: Pagination token for retrieving next page of results (optional)

use_cache.title: Use Cache
use_cache.description: Use cached results if available to reduce costs and speed up results

maximum_cache_age.title: Maximum Cache Age (seconds)
maximum_cache_age.description: Maximum age of cached results in seconds. Must be at least 1. Only used if Use Cache is enabled.
